title: MAGIC Agent Skill Schema (agentskills.io compliant)
description: Schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter. Follows agentskills.io spec with MAGIC extensions in metadata.

name.description: Skill identifier (lowercase, hyphens, must match directory name)

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it

license.description: License name or reference to bundled license file

compatibility.description: Environment requirements (Python version, system packages, etc.)

metadata.description: MAGIC extensions. The agentskills.io spec says string-to-string, but the official skills-ref validator does not enforce value types. We use rich types (arrays for tags/scripts/dependencies, booleans for requires_llm, integers for phase) for usability while maintaining root-level spec compliance.
